fn drain_old_entries(map: &mut std::collections::HashMap<String, Vec<u8>>) {
    map.retain(|_, v| !v.is_empty());
}

fn process_completed(queue: &mut Vec<Task>) {
    queue.retain(|t| !t.done);
}

fn drain_and_process(queue: &mut Vec<Task>) {
    for task in queue.drain(..) {
        if task.done {
            archive(task);
        }
    }
}

fn archive(_task: Task) {}
struct Task { done: bool }
